tools.name: JSON Formatter
tools.description: Validate, prettify, and minify structured payloads without leaving the browser.

tools.name: Base64 Studio
tools.description: Encode or decode text payloads with clear input and output surfaces.

tools.name: Hash Generator
tools.description: Create deterministic MD5, SHA-256, and SHA-512 digests for local integrity checks.

tools.name: Password Generator
tools.description: Generate strong passwords locally with configurable character sets and live strength feedback.

tools.name: URL Studio
tools.description: Encode or decode URL-safe strings while keeping source text private in the browser.

tools.name: Case Converter
tools.description: Switch between common naming conventions for code, APIs, and docs.

tools.name: Timestamp Converter
tools.description: Convert Unix seconds or milliseconds into human-readable local and ISO dates.

tools.name: JWT Decoder
tools.description: Decode token headers and payloads locally with quick warnings for expiry and unsafe algorithms.

tools.name: Regex Tester
tools.description: Test JavaScript patterns with live match counts, capture groups, and highlighted results.

tools.name: QR Code Generator
tools.description: Create downloadable QR codes from text or links without sending content anywhere.

tools.name: UUID Generator
tools.description: Generate local UUID batches for identifiers, fixtures, and test data.

tools.name: ULID Generator
tools.description: Create sortable ULIDs locally for ordered records and compact identifiers.

tools.name: HMAC Generator
tools.description: Produce SHA-256 and SHA-512 HMAC signatures in-browser from a message and secret.

tools.name: Query String Studio
tools.description: Round-trip JSON parameter objects and URL query strings without server calls.

tools.name: HTML Entity Studio
tools.description: Encode or decode HTML entities safely for templates, docs, and copied snippets.

tools.name: Hex Studio
tools.description: Encode text into hexadecimal bytes or decode hex back into readable text locally.

tools.name: Slugify Studio
tools.description: Create URL-friendly slugs and path-safe variants from titles, labels, and filenames.

tools.name: Unicode Escape Studio
tools.description: Transform readable text into unicode escape sequences and decode them back again.

tools.name: CSV JSON Studio
tools.description: Round-trip CSV tables and JSON arrays locally for fixtures, imports, and exports.

tools.name: Text Diff Checker
tools.description: Compare two text blocks line by line to inspect additions and removals privately.

tools.name: Docker Optimizer
tools.description: Review Dockerfiles for repeatability, image size, and runtime hygiene inside the browser.

tools.name: GitHub Actions Validator
tools.description: Check workflow YAML for missing triggers, job wiring, checkout steps, and CI safety signals.

tools.name: Dependency Visualizer
tools.description: Inspect package manifests for grouped dependencies, scripts, and duplicate package names.

tools.name: Bundle Size Calculator
tools.description: Estimate asset totals, file mix, and rough gzip impact from pasted build output.

tools.name: cURL to Code Converter
tools.description: Turn a raw cURL request into fetch, axios, and Python starter snippets locally.

tools.name: SQL Beautifier
tools.description: Format pasted SQL into a cleaner review layout before you run or share the query.

tools.name: Semantic Version Calculator
tools.description: Estimate patch, minor, and major bumps from release notes and compatibility signals.

tools.name: Breaking Change Detector
tools.description: Compare two JSON shapes to surface removed fields and type shifts that may break consumers.

tools.name: HTTP Header Inspector
tools.description: Review raw response headers for missing security controls, cache policy, and CORS posture.

tools.name: Cron Expression Explainer
tools.description: Break down five-part cron expressions and preview the next matching run times.

tools.name: Docker Compose Auditor
tools.description: Inspect docker-compose service definitions for health, restart coverage, and image hygiene.

tools.name: OpenAPI Summary
tools.description: Summarize an OpenAPI document into paths, methods, tags, and detected security schemes.

tools.name: Markdown Table Builder
tools.description: Convert CSV rows or JSON arrays into markdown tables for docs, PRs, and release notes.

tools.name: JSON Schema Generator
tools.description: Infer a draft JSON Schema from a representative JSON sample entirely in the browser.
